title: About Me — Formatted Bio
description: Enhance your About Me section with formatted text. Write a short bio that uses <strong> for key skills or qualities, <em> for emphasis on important phrases, and <mark> to highlight a standout achievement or specialty.
starter_code:
# Portfolio Website — Step 3: Text Formatting # Enhance the About Me section with strong, em, and mark elements. html = """ My Portfolio

Your Name

Welcome to my portfolio!

About Me

I am a developer who is passionate about building things.

My Projects

Here are some of my recent projects.

Contact

Get in touch with me.

""" print(html)
test_code:
assert '' in html.lower() and '' in html.lower(), 'Must include for bold emphasis' assert '' in html.lower() and '' in html.lower(), 'Must include for italic emphasis' assert '' in html.lower() and '' in html.lower(), 'Must include to highlight text' assert '

' in html.lower(), 'Must still include h2 section headings' assert html.lower().count('

') >= 3, 'Must include at least 3 paragraphs'
acceptance_criteria: About Me section contains a bio with formatted text
<strong> element is used for bold emphasis
<em> element is used for italic emphasis
<mark> element is used to highlight text
